what.headline: Full Stack Development near Düsseldorf
what.subheadline: Expert for Vue.js, Laravel and WordPress
paragraphs: As a full-stack developer, I support frontend development and backend development of websites and web apps. I am an expert for Vue.js in frontend, Laravel backends and WordPress as CMS solution.
I quickly get up to speed with new technologies — with the goal of building the best possible solution, independent of any particular stack.

why.headline: Full Stack is my profession. Frontend is my passion.
paragraphs: I’m passionate about UI effects, animations, and creating intuitive user experiences. Clean UX/UI and pixel-perfect implementation are important to me.
At the same time, I enjoy the technical side just as much — solving complex problems, working through business logic, and building robust systems.

about.headline: About me
paragraphs: I am Christoph, living near Düsseldorf, and have been working as a web developer since 2012. After studying media informatics, I worked for a total of 9 years at Me & Company. Since the end of 2022, I have been working full-time as a freelancer.

contact.headline: Get in touch
contact.paragraph1: In collaboration I always think along, question critically and like to contribute with my own ideas. I can also act in an advisory role when finding solutions.
contact.paragraph2: Feel free to contact me at
